creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
I'd like to propose a new classification for bugs in Bugzilla -- to allow easier grouping of PRs about ports which, though they build/install fine from scratch,  fail if a version (earlier or otherwise) of the same port is already found on the build-system.

I'm not sure, how to best name it -- "upgrade-failure" or "port-upgrade-failure"?
